message:
feat(fp-frame): add groupby agg dict-of-list parity (frankenpandas-715r)

Adds DataFrameGroupBy::agg_dict_list(&HashMap<String, Vec<String>>)
matching df.groupby(col).agg({'a': ['sum','mean'], 'b': ['min','max']}).
Each input column gets one output column per function, named
{col}_{func}. Output order follows the original DataFrame column
order (not HashMap iteration order); funcs within a column follow
the slice order supplied. Empty func lists, group-key-column
aggregation, and unsupported funcs are rejected. 5 new tests:
per-column funcs, single-func, empty-list rejection, group-key
rejection, column-order preservation against HashMap insertion order.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
